notes: Assumption quality is the standout strength — the model surfaces genuine high-risk uncertainties (AU licensing perimeter, intra-group agreement coverage, AML/CFT channel-specific risk) with risk-if-wrong; however, no named personas with cost/timing are provided, MVP scope is not bounded (no explicit deferrals named, NZ→AU only and $10k cap are mentioned but not structured as a bounded MVP), out-of-scope items lack the required enumeration with reasons, and success indicators lack baseline anchoring — together these gaps prevent a pass.
